rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §21.507, which governs preferences for selecting program participants based on educational or military experience for teaching positions.
quote: Sec. 21.507. PREFERENCES. (a) In selecting persons to participate in the program, the agency shall give preference to a person who:
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to the proposed change.
